item.title: Contact form
item.dc:creator: digverisuperadmin
item.content:encoded:
[text fullname id:form_name placeholder "Full Name"]
[email email id:form_email placeholder "Email Address"]
[phonetext* phonenumber id:form_phoness placeholder "Phone Number"]
[text company id:form_company placeholder "Company Name"]
[select budgetrange id:form_budgetrange first_as_label "--Please Select Budget Range--" "INR 40k -60k" "INR 60k to 1 Lac" "INR 1 lac and above"]
[checkbox serviceschk id:form_services use_label_element "Organic Marketing" "Paid Social Media Advertising" "Pay-Per-Click Advertising" "Performance Marketing" "E-commerce Platforms" "Data Strategy and Consulting" "Native Advertising" "WhatsApp Marketing" "Branding and Design" "Search Engine Optimization" "Generative Search Optimisation"]
[honeypot company-mail-honey id:idattr class:classattr wrapper-id:wrapperid move-inline-css:true "Enter the organization mail"] [textarea message id:form_message placeholder] Brief your tentative start date, goals, platforms of interest, reference brands, etc. [/textarea]
[submit class:butn-submit "Send Request"]
1 New Contact Us Submission [_site_title] info@digiveritaz.com Hi Team, A new inquiry has been submitted through the Contact Us form. Here are the details: Name : [fullname] Email : [email] Phone Number : [phonenumber] Company : [company] Budget Range : [budgetrange] Services : [serviceschk] Message : [message] Please follow up with the contacter as soon as possible. Best, DigiVeritaz 1 Thank You for Contacting Us [_site_title] [email] Hi [fullname], Thank you for reaching out to us! We’ve received your message and will get back to you shortly. If your inquiry is urgent, please call us directly at 7045337060 / 9956655662. We appreciate your patience and look forward to assisting you. Best regards, DigiVeritas 7045337060 / 9956655662 Thank you for your message. It has been sent. There was an error trying to send your message. Please try again later. One or more fields have an error. Please check and try again. There was an error trying to send your message. Please try again later. You must accept the terms and conditions before sending your message. Please fill out this field. This field has a too long input. This field has a too short input. There was an unknown error uploading the file. You are not allowed to upload files of this type. The uploaded file is too large. There was an error uploading the file. Please enter a date in YYYY-MM-DD format. This field has a too early date. This field has a too late date. Please enter a number. This field has a too small number. This field has a too large number. The answer to the quiz is incorrect. Please enter an email address. Please enter a URL. Please enter a telephone number.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value:
[text fullname id:form_name placeholder "Full Name"]
[email email id:form_email placeholder "Email Address"]
[phonetext* phonenumber id:form_phoness placeholder "Phone Number"]
[text company id:form_company placeholder "Company Name"]
[select budgetrange id:form_budgetrange first_as_label "--Please Select Budget Range--" "INR 40k -60k" "INR 60k to 1 Lac" "INR 1 lac and above"]
[checkbox serviceschk id:form_services use_label_element "Organic Marketing" "Paid Social Media Advertising" "Pay-Per-Click Advertising" "Performance Marketing" "E-commerce Platforms" "Data Strategy and Consulting" "Native Advertising" "WhatsApp Marketing" "Branding and Design" "Search Engine Optimization" "Generative Search Optimisation"]
[honeypot company-mail-honey id:idattr class:classattr wrapper-id:wrapperid move-inline-css:true "Enter the organization mail"] [textarea message id:form_message placeholder] Brief your tentative start date, goals, platforms of interest, reference brands, etc. [/textarea]
[submit class:butn-submit "Send Request"]

a:9:{s:6:"active";b:1;s:7:"subject";s:25:"New Contact Us Submission";s:6:"sender";s:41:"[_site_title] <wordpress@digiveritaz.com>";s:9:"recipient";s:20:"info@digiveritaz.com";s:4:"body";s:328:"Hi Team,
A new inquiry has been submitted through the Contact Us form. Here are the details:
Name : [fullname] Email : [email] Phone Number : [phonenumber] Company : [company] Budget Range : [budgetrange] Services : [serviceschk] Message : [message]
Please follow up with the contacter as soon as possible. Best, DigiVeritaz";s:18:"additional_headers";s:0:"";s:11:"attachments";s:0:"";s:8:"use_html";b:0;s:13:"exclude_blank";b:0;}

a:9:{s:6:"active";b:1;s:7:"subject";s:27:"Thank You for Contacting Us";s:6:"sender";s:36:"[_site_title] <info@digiveritaz.com>";s:9:"recipient";s:7:"[email]";s:4:"body";s:308:"Hi [fullname],
Thank you for reaching out to us! We’ve received your message and will get back to you shortly. If your inquiry is urgent, please call us directly at 7045337060 / 9956655662.
We appreciate your patience and look forward to assisting you.
Best regards, DigiVeritas 7045337060 / 9956655662";s:18:"additional_headers";s:0:"";s:11:"attachments";s:0:"";s:8:"use_html";b:0;s:13:"exclude_blank";b:0;}

a:22:{s:12:"mail_sent_ok";s:45:"Thank you for your message. It has been sent.";s:12:"mail_sent_ng";s:71:"There was an error trying to send your message. Please try again later.";s:16:"validation_error";s:61:"One or more fields have an error. Please check and try again.";s:4:"spam";s:71:"There was an error trying to send your message. Please try again later.";s:12:"accept_terms";s:69:"You must accept the terms and conditions before sending your message.";s:16:"invalid_required";s:27:"Please fill out this field.";s:16:"invalid_too_long";s:32:"This field has a too long input.";s:17:"invalid_too_short";s:33:"This field has a too short input.";s:13:"upload_failed";s:46:"There was an unknown error uploading the file.";s:24:"upload_file_type_invalid";s:49:"You are not allowed to upload files of this type.";s:21:"upload_file_too_large";s:31:"The uploaded file is too large.";s:23:"upload_failed_php_error";s:38:"There was an error uploading the file.";s:12:"invalid_date";s:41:"Please enter a date in YYYY-MM-DD format.";s:14:"date_too_early";s:32:"This field has a too early date.";s:13:"date_too_late";s:31:"This field has a too late date.";s:14:"invalid_number";s:22:"Please enter a number.";s:16:"number_too_small";s:34:"This field has a too small number.";s:16:"number_too_large";s:34:"This field has a too large number.";s:23:"quiz_answer_not_correct";s:36:"The answer to the quiz is incorrect.";s:13:"invalid_email";s:30:"Please enter an email address.";s:11:"invalid_url";s:19:"Please enter a URL.";s:11:"invalid_tel";s:32:"Please enter a telephone number.";}

item.title: Contact form modal
item.dc:creator: digverisuperadmin
item.content:encoded:
[text fullname id:form1_name placeholder "Full Name"]
[email email id:form1_email placeholder "Email Address"]
[phonetext* phonenumber autocomplete:tel id:form1_phone class:form1_phone placeholder "Phone Number"]
[text company id:form1_company placeholder "Company Name"]
[select budgetrange id:form1_budgetrange first_as_label "--Please Select Budget Range--" "INR 40k -60k" "INR 60k to 1 Lac" "INR 1 lac and above"]
[checkbox serviceschk id:form1_services use_label_element "Organic Marketing" "Paid Social Media Advertising" "Pay-Per-Click Advertising" "Performance Marketing" "E-commerce Platforms" "Data Strategy and Consulting" "Native Advertising" "WhatsApp Marketing" "Branding and Design" "Search Engine Optimization" "Generative Search Optimisation"]
[honeypot company-mail-honey-modal "Enter the organization mail"] [textarea message id:form1_message placeholder] Brief your tentative start date, goals, platforms of interest, reference brands, etc. [/textarea]
[submit class:modalsubmit "Send Request"]
1 New Contact Us Submission [_site_title] info@digiveritaz.com Hi Team, A new inquiry has been submitted through the Contact Us form. Here are the details: Name : [fullname] Email : [email] Phone Number : [phonenumber] Company : [company] Budget Range : [budgetrange] Services : [serviceschk] Message : [message] Please follow up with the contacter as soon as possible. Best, DigiVeritaz 1 Thank You for Contacting Us [_site_title] [email] Hi [fullname], Thank you for reaching out to us! We’ve received your message and will get back to you shortly. If your inquiry is urgent, please call us directly at 7045337060 / 9956655662. We appreciate your patience and look forward to assisting you. Best regards, DigiVeritas 7045337060 / 9956655662 Thank you for your message. It has been sent. There was an error trying to send your message. Please try again later. One or more fields have an error. Please check and try again. There was an error trying to send your message. Please try again later. You must accept the terms and conditions before sending your message. Please fill out this field. This field has a too long input. This field has a too short input. There was an unknown error uploading the file. You are not allowed to upload files of this type. The uploaded file is too large. There was an error uploading the file. Please enter a date in YYYY-MM-DD format. This field has a too early date. This field has a too late date. Please enter a number. This field has a too small number. This field has a too large number. The answer to the quiz is incorrect. Please enter an email address. Please enter a URL. Please enter a telephone number.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value:
[text fullname id:form1_name placeholder "Full Name"]
[email email id:form1_email placeholder "Email Address"]
[phonetext* phonenumber autocomplete:tel id:form1_phone class:form1_phone placeholder "Phone Number"]
[text company id:form1_company placeholder "Company Name"]
[select budgetrange id:form1_budgetrange first_as_label "--Please Select Budget Range--" "INR 40k -60k" "INR 60k to 1 Lac" "INR 1 lac and above"]
[checkbox serviceschk id:form1_services use_label_element "Organic Marketing" "Paid Social Media Advertising" "Pay-Per-Click Advertising" "Performance Marketing" "E-commerce Platforms" "Data Strategy and Consulting" "Native Advertising" "WhatsApp Marketing" "Branding and Design" "Search Engine Optimization" "Generative Search Optimisation"]
[honeypot company-mail-honey-modal "Enter the organization mail"] [textarea message id:form1_message placeholder] Brief your tentative start date, goals, platforms of interest, reference brands, etc. [/textarea]
[submit class:modalsubmit "Send Request"]

a:9:{s:6:"active";b:1;s:7:"subject";s:25:"New Contact Us Submission";s:6:"sender";s:41:"[_site_title] <wordpress@digiveritaz.com>";s:9:"recipient";s:20:"info@digiveritaz.com";s:4:"body";s:328:"Hi Team,
A new inquiry has been submitted through the Contact Us form. Here are the details:
Name : [fullname] Email : [email] Phone Number : [phonenumber] Company : [company] Budget Range : [budgetrange] Services : [serviceschk] Message : [message]
Please follow up with the contacter as soon as possible. Best, DigiVeritaz";s:18:"additional_headers";s:0:"";s:11:"attachments";s:0:"";s:8:"use_html";b:0;s:13:"exclude_blank";b:0;}

a:9:{s:6:"active";b:1;s:7:"subject";s:27:"Thank You for Contacting Us";s:6:"sender";s:36:"[_site_title] <info@digiveritaz.com>";s:9:"recipient";s:7:"[email]";s:4:"body";s:308:"Hi [fullname],
Thank you for reaching out to us! We’ve received your message and will get back to you shortly. If your inquiry is urgent, please call us directly at 7045337060 / 9956655662.
We appreciate your patience and look forward to assisting you.
Best regards, DigiVeritas 7045337060 / 9956655662";s:18:"additional_headers";s:0:"";s:11:"attachments";s:0:"";s:8:"use_html";b:0;s:13:"exclude_blank";b:0;}

a:22:{s:12:"mail_sent_ok";s:45:"Thank you for your message. It has been sent.";s:12:"mail_sent_ng";s:71:"There was an error trying to send your message. Please try again later.";s:16:"validation_error";s:61:"One or more fields have an error. Please check and try again.";s:4:"spam";s:71:"There was an error trying to send your message. Please try again later.";s:12:"accept_terms";s:69:"You must accept the terms and conditions before sending your message.";s:16:"invalid_required";s:27:"Please fill out this field.";s:16:"invalid_too_long";s:32:"This field has a too long input.";s:17:"invalid_too_short";s:33:"This field has a too short input.";s:13:"upload_failed";s:46:"There was an unknown error uploading the file.";s:24:"upload_file_type_invalid";s:49:"You are not allowed to upload files of this type.";s:21:"upload_file_too_large";s:31:"The uploaded file is too large.";s:23:"upload_failed_php_error";s:38:"There was an error uploading the file.";s:12:"invalid_date";s:41:"Please enter a date in YYYY-MM-DD format.";s:14:"date_too_early";s:32:"This field has a too early date.";s:13:"date_too_late";s:31:"This field has a too late date.";s:14:"invalid_number";s:22:"Please enter a number.";s:16:"number_too_small";s:34:"This field has a too small number.";s:16:"number_too_large";s:34:"This field has a too large number.";s:23:"quiz_answer_not_correct";s:36:"The answer to the quiz is incorrect.";s:13:"invalid_email";s:30:"Please enter an email address.";s:11:"invalid_url";s:19:"Please enter a URL.";s:11:"invalid_tel";s:32:"Please enter a telephone number.";}
